case_title: TRANG LA VS. RICHARD H GIBSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-31-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-31-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
